ab: munhan cak takna acang tantungu han qudasnanaz.
ch: 昨天我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: talmadin cam nitu pasadu, miliskin cak cia.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: sadu ka qudasnanaz zaku, usun cak pa’ka’un salitung, paqu’ ucia’.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃木瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat papaya and drink tea.

ab: madavuc ca sincuaz qudasnanaz salitung, macial ko’nun.
ch: 爺爺種的木瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The papaya grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: asa amin cak ucia’ i qudasnanaz, macial amin qu’dan.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: matu tongquvali ka, muskun cak qudasno’az pit’ia petutongquvali.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: mahanat ta qudasno’az mahancum tu petutongquvali, heza iskan, tulkuk, bahat, hezang qazuqazu’.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: mina’unin tongquvali, munhan cam pisanglavan matinguc sanglav.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: siza’ a qudasno’az madia hutan, tai cin tilkum, napa’adas zaku mulumaq.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: namudanin cak, tupaun zaku nai tu namoqnang cak mun’iti sadu mu’u.
ch: 我要離開了，我對他們說下次再來看你們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
